name: Cave Slime
description: A subspecies of the common slime. They have a dark, purple color, and are slightly bigger. They have evolved to live in dark, damp, and cavernous areas with little to no light, hence their name. They are more solitary than normal slimes, which normally hang out in groups. They like living in dark, damp areas. Cave slimes are one of the of the few inedible slimes, due to their lifestyle in caves, making them toxic. They're scientific name is Mucus Vulgaris Specus. A cave slime appeared! What will you do?
creator: Steve_The_Slime
